{"parts":[{"content":"**Clarifying formatting instructions**

The user mentioned that the format should include “based on my screens,” which raises some questions, especially since they want it to be part of the bottom line text and avoid repetition. I’ll include it just once while keeping it minimal. It seems like I can have "based on my screens" but not mention "Careerspan" or "three screens" again since that’s covered in the header. I’ll also need to address the footer overlapping the culture column by adjusting the
